notes: All v125 Alerts features verified: lastTriggered column, Current Value column, webhookUrl in create form, Recent Triggers section. Dashboard, Clusters, Deployments all functional. Pods route returns 404 but is not in navigation — likely accessed via cluster detail view.

areas.name: Alerts Page
areas.notes: Shows Alert Rules table with Name, Metric, Condition, Cluster, Status, Last Triggered, Current Value columns. Recent Triggers section present. Create Alert button visible.

areas.name: Create Alert Form
areas.notes: Dialog shows: Alert name, Metric dropdown (CPU Usage), Condition (>), Threshold value, Cluster filter (optional), Webhook URL (optional) — all v125 requirements met.

areas.name: Dashboard
areas.notes: Loads correctly. Shows Total Nodes, Running Pods, Clusters count, Warning Events. Anomalies summary and Clusters overview with prod-cluster-eks and test-cluster-minikube.

areas.name: Clusters
areas.notes: Loads with table view showing Name, Provider, Health, Access, Version, Nodes, Endpoint, Last Seen, Actions columns. Skeleton loading visible.

areas.name: Pods
areas.notes: /pods returns 404. No Pods link in navigation sidebar. Pods may be accessible via cluster detail view only.

areas.name: Deployments
areas.notes: Shows 7 deployments (ingress-nginx, coredns, jaeger, postgres, redis, voyager-api v125, voyager-web v125). All Running status. Restart and Scale buttons present for each.

areas.name: Navigation
areas.notes: All sidebar links load: Dashboard, Clusters, Shared Dashboards, Health, Deployments, Events, Alerts, Anomalies, Logs, AI Assistant, Feature Flags, Webhooks, Users, Audit Log, Settings, Karpenter, Teams, Permissions. No standalone Pods link.
